reports.title: Fallen Tree Blocking Sidewalk
reports.description: A large tree has fallen and is blocking the sidewalk near the park entrance. Emergency crews have been notified.
reports.locationLabel: Cadman Plaza West, Brooklyn Heights, Brooklyn, NY

reports.title: Construction Zone Narrowing Lane
reports.description: Road construction causing narrow lanes and significant delays on the main corridor. Flaggers present but insufficient signage.
reports.adminFeedback: Crews are aware — additional signage requested.

reports.title: Slippery Road After Heavy Rain
reports.description: Road is extremely slippery due to recent rain combined with oil residue. Two minor skids reported within an hour.
reports.locationLabel: Atlantic Ave & Hoyt St, Brooklyn, NY
reports.adminFeedback: Please add approximate road segment or cross streets so crews can locate the hazard.

reports.title: Suspicious Vehicle Parked for Hours
reports.description: Neighbor reported an unfamiliar vehicle parked with engine running for over two hours. Plates partially obscured.

reports.title: Elevator Outage at MetroTech Dorms
reports.description: Facilities team on-site after residents reported elevator doors not closing properly in the east tower. Building has no alternative lift access.

reports.title: Gas Smell Near Jay Street Entrance
reports.description: Pedestrians reported a strong natural gas odor near the Jay St subway entrance. Cones placed while FDNY investigates. Avoid the area.

reports.title: Crowded Platform After Stalled Train
reports.description: Service paused for 15 minutes leading to dangerous platform overcrowding at Borough Hall station mezzanine. Passengers pushing near edge.

reports.title: Large Pothole Forming on Flatbush Ave
reports.description: Drivers swerving to avoid a rapidly widening pothole near Flatbush Ave and Willoughby St. A cyclist reportedly fell this morning.
reports.locationLabel: Flatbush Ave & Willoughby St, Brooklyn, NY

reports.title: Assault Reported Near MetroTech Commons
reports.description: NYPD responding to a reported assault near the center lawn. Area temporarily cordoned off. Witnesses asked to stay back.

reports.title: Bike Theft Cluster Near Navy Street Racks
reports.description: Three cyclists reported missing bikes from the same rack within an hour. Security footage from nearby business requested by NYPD.

reports.title: Water Main Break Near York Street
reports.description: NYC DEP crews responding to a water main break causing minor flooding in the curb lane. Water pressure affected in surrounding blocks.

reports.title: Smoke Spotted on Adams Street Rooftop
reports.description: Light smoke coming from a rooftop HVAC unit. FDNY notified and en route. Residents on upper floors asked to evacuate as precaution.

reports.title: Broken Streetlight at Myrtle Ave & Duffield
reports.description: Streetlight cycling on and off creating dangerous dark crossing conditions. Two near-misses with pedestrians reported at this intersection.
reports.locationLabel: Myrtle Ave & Duffield St, Brooklyn, NY

reports.title: Debris Falling from Scaffolding
reports.description: Loose plastic sheeting and small debris falling from scaffolding onto the sidewalk near Willoughby Street. Area not cordoned off.

reports.title: Delivery Truck Double-Parked on Fulton Mall
reports.description: Truck blocking bus lane causing significant backups toward Adams Street. Bus stop completely inaccessible for accessibility users.

reports.title: Crowded Crosswalk Near DeKalb Station
reports.description: Long pedestrian wait times at all four crossings. Signal timing appears misconfigured causing crowd spillover into the roadway.

reports.title: After-Hours Construction Noise
reports.description: Jackhammering reported well past permitted hours near Flatbush and State Street. Residents unable to sleep. Permits not posted.
reports.locationLabel: Flatbush Ave & State St, Brooklyn, NY

reports.title: Loose Manhole Cover Near Nevins Street
reports.description: Cover rattles and shifts when cars pass creating risk for cyclists and motorcyclists. Reported twice before with no resolution.

reports.title: Hazardous Materials Odor at Navy Yard Gate
reports.description: Strong chemical odor drifting toward Flushing Ave entrance of the Navy Yard. Workers and pedestrians reporting eye irritation.
reports.locationLabel: Flushing Ave Gate, Brooklyn Navy Yard, NY

reports.title: Fallen Signage Near Atlantic Terminal
reports.description: Large wayfinding sign knocked over by wind, partially blocking the sidewalk. Pedestrians forced into the roadway to pass.

reports.title: Erratic Driver on Sands Street
reports.description: Vehicle weaving across the bike lane and nearly striking two cyclists. License plate partially visible. NYPD notified.

reports.title: Power Outage Affecting Jay Street Storefronts
reports.description: Multiple stores reporting flickering lights and register outages. Con Edison on hold. One restaurant lost refrigeration stock.

reports.title: Encampment Forming Near Cadman Plaza
reports.description: Tents observed overnight near the west entrance. Occupants reportedly approached passersby aggressively. Outreach teams requested.
reports.locationLabel: Cadman Plaza West, Brooklyn Heights, NY

reports.title: Elevator Stuck at 141 Livingston Lobby
reports.description: Passengers trapped for five minutes before alarm was acknowledged. Second entrapment this month in same elevator. Repair overdue.

reports.title: Street Performance Drawing Unsafe Crowd
reports.description: Large crowd spilling into the roadway near Albee Square. Vehicles unable to pass. Traffic agent presence requested immediately.

reports.title: Graffiti Tagging on Bridge Street Storefronts
reports.description: Fresh spray paint observed on three rolling gates overnight. Security cameras nearby confirmed two individuals at 3am.

reports.title: Aggressive Stray Dog Near Commodore Barry Park
reports.description: Large stray dog reported chasing joggers and cyclists near Flushing Ave edge of the park. Dog appears injured and distressed.

reports.title: Hydrant Struck by Vehicle on Bridge Plaza
reports.description: Hydrant tilted and leaking slowly after being struck by a delivery vehicle. FDNY requested for emergency shutoff. Street partially flooded.

reports.title: Tour Bus Idling Near Washington Street
reports.description: Diesel fumes accumulating near popular tourist photo spot from idling buses. Locals and shop owners requesting enforcement of anti-idling law.

reports.title: Flooded Bike Lane Under Manhattan Bridge
reports.description: Standing water forcing cyclists into traffic lane after overnight rain. Drain appears blocked. Multiple cyclists reported near-misses with cars.
reports.locationLabel: Manhattan Bridge Bike Path, DUMBO, Brooklyn, NY

reports.title: Broken Window at Community Center Entrance
reports.description: Large front window shattered overnight. Glass on sidewalk poses injury risk. Building manager contacted but not yet on-site.

reports.title: Overflowing Dumpster Near Chapel Street
reports.description: Commercial dumpster overflowing onto sidewalk for third consecutive day. Foul odor reported. Sanitation called but no pickup yet.

reports.title: Flooded Intersection After Storm Drain Backup
reports.description: Standing water knee-deep at 36th Street intersection. Storm drain completely blocked. Pedestrians and cyclists unable to cross safely.
reports.adminFeedback: DEP crew dispatched. Please monitor and update if water level rises.

reports.title: Fare Machine Out of Order at Park Ave Station
reports.description: Both MetroCard machines broken at entrance. Agent booth unstaffed. Commuters unable to purchase or reload cards during peak hours.
reports.adminFeedback: MTA notified. Estimated repair window 48 hours.

reports.title: Scaffolding Partial Collapse on 7th Ave
reports.description: Section of scaffolding on 7th Ave buckled and partially collapsed onto sidewalk. No injuries reported but area must be cordoned immediately.

reports.title: Crowd Surge at Times Square Crosswalk
reports.description: Tourists and commuters packed at all four crossings during signal failure. People spilling into active lanes. Traffic control needed immediately.

reports.title: Gas Leak Smell from Williamsburg Building
reports.description: Strong gas odor emanating from basement of a residential building on Bedford Ave. Con Edison called. Residents asked to vacate upper floors.

reports.title: Hit and Run on 5th Avenue Near Park Slope
reports.description: Cyclist struck by vehicle that fled the scene. Victim with non-life-threatening injuries. Police responding. Witness accounts being collected.
reports.locationLabel: 5th Ave & Union St, Park Slope, Brooklyn, NY

reports.title: Power Lines Down in Crown Heights
reports.description: Storm winds brought down a power line on Eastern Pkwy. Live wire on sidewalk. Block completely blacked out. DO NOT APPROACH.
reports.locationLabel: Eastern Pkwy, Crown Heights, Brooklyn, NY

reports.title: Water Main Burst Flooding Astoria Street
reports.description: Water main rupture on 31st Ave sending water two feet deep across two lanes. Businesses on ground floor at risk. DEP notified.

reports.title: Suspicious Package Near Delancey Street Station
reports.description: Unattended bag left near turnstiles for over 30 minutes. MTA police notified. Station partially evacuated. Service disruption expected.
reports.locationLabel: Delancey St-Essex St Station, Lower East Side, NY

reports.title: Pedestrian Struck by Vehicle in Hell's Kitchen
reports.description: Pedestrian struck at crosswalk during green light. Victim transported to Bellevue. Driver remained on scene. Police managing traffic.
reports.locationLabel: 9th Ave & 46th St, Hell's Kitchen, Manhattan, NY

reports.title: Abandoned Vehicle Blocking Long Island City Bike Lane
reports.description: Car without plates parked in protected bike lane for over 48 hours. Cyclists forced into moving traffic. 311 report filed twice with no response.
reports.locationLabel: Jackson Ave, Long Island City, Queens, NY

reports.title: Underpass Flooding Trapping Vehicles in Bay Ridge
reports.description: Three vehicles stalled after driving into flooded underpass. Water depth underestimated. Fire rescue dispatched to assist stranded drivers.
reports.locationLabel: 65th St Underpass, Bay Ridge, Brooklyn, NY

reports.title: Chemical Odor from Sunset Park Warehouse
reports.description: Sharp chemical smell drifting from industrial warehouse. Workers nearby reporting dizziness and eye irritation. FDNY Hazmat requested.
reports.locationLabel: 3rd Ave & 38th St, Sunset Park, Brooklyn, NY

reports.title: Armed Robbery on Church Avenue
reports.description: Two individuals robbed at gunpoint outside ATM. Suspects fled on foot heading north. NYPD on scene. Avoid area. Canvass in progress.
reports.locationLabel: Church Ave & Flatbush Ave, Flatbush, Brooklyn, NY

reports.title: Multi-Car Pileup on Queens Boulevard
reports.description: Four-vehicle accident blocking two westbound lanes. One driver with serious injuries. Queens Blvd closed between 70th and 72nd. Expect major delays.
reports.locationLabel: Queens Blvd & 71st Ave, Forest Hills, Queens, NY

reports.title: Broken Water Main Flooding Downtown Flushing
reports.description: Water main failure at Main Street intersection. Heavy flooding across three blocks. Businesses closed. DEP crew estimated 4-hour repair time.
reports.locationLabel: Main St & Roosevelt Ave, Flushing, Queens, NY

reports.title: Fire Alarm Triggered at SoHo Loft Building
reports.description: Alarm triggered by cooking smoke in a shared loft kitchen. Building partially evacuated. FDNY on site confirming no structural fire. All clear expected soon.
reports.locationLabel: Prince St & Broadway, SoHo, Manhattan, NY

reports.title: Manhole Cover Sparking in East Village
reports.description: Manhole cover emitting sparks and smoke near 2nd Ave. Likely underground electrical fault. Con Edison dispatched. Area cordoned with caution tape.
reports.locationLabel: 2nd Ave & St Marks Pl, East Village, Manhattan, NY

reports.title: Scaffolding Missing Safety Net in Chelsea
reports.description: Safety netting missing from three bays of scaffolding on 23rd Street. Tools and materials visible on upper level. Workers unaware per building super.

reports.title: Shooting Incident on Fulton Street
reports.description: Shots fired near Fulton and Nostrand intersection. One person with non-life-threatening wounds. Multiple police units on scene. Avoid area.
reports.locationLabel: Fulton St & Nostrand Ave, Bed-Stuy, Brooklyn, NY

reports.title: Oil Spill Near Newtown Creek in Greenpoint
reports.description: Visible oil sheen on Newtown Creek surface extending approximately 200 meters. Foul odor. Kayakers warned away. EPA and DEC notified.

reports.title: Large Branch Blocking Cobble Hill Sidewalk
reports.description: Storm brought down a large branch completely blocking the sidewalk on Clinton Street. Pedestrians walking in the road. Parks Dept notified.
reports.locationLabel: Clinton St, Cobble Hill, Brooklyn, NY

reports.title: Flash Flooding Under Bridge St Underpass in DUMBO
reports.description: Underpass completely submerged after heavy overnight rain. Several cyclists entered and had to turn back. City warned this drain requires urgent maintenance.
reports.locationLabel: Bridge St Underpass, DUMBO, Brooklyn, NY

reports.title: Elevator Stuck with Occupants in Murray Hill
reports.description: Elevator stalled between 8th and 9th floors with four people trapped. Fire department extraction in progress. No injuries reported so far.
reports.locationLabel: Park Ave S & 35th St, Murray Hill, Manhattan, NY

reports.title: Smoke from Electrical Panel in Financial District
reports.description: Smoke visible from a utility room panel at ground floor. Building's fire suppression system activated. Evacuation in progress. FDNY responding.
reports.locationLabel: Broadway & Wall St, Financial District, Manhattan, NY

reports.title: Gas Leak Near Marcus Garvey Park in Harlem
reports.description: Con Edison responding to reported gas odor covering a two-block radius. Residents asked to open windows and avoid using stoves or electrical switches.

reports.title: Burst Pipe Flooding Upper West Side Lobby
reports.description: Overhead pipe burst flooding apartment building lobby and basement level. Residents evacuating. Water reaching elevator shaft. Plumber en route.
reports.locationLabel: Broadway & 80th St, Upper West Side, Manhattan, NY

reports.title: Downed Power Line After Crash in East Harlem
reports.description: Vehicle struck a utility pole bringing power lines onto the road. Live wires possible. Block fully blacked out. Multiple injuries in vehicle reported.
reports.locationLabel: Lexington Ave & 116th St, East Harlem, Manhattan, NY

reports.title: Transit Bus Struck Pedestrian in Jackson Heights
reports.description: MTA bus made wide right turn striking a pedestrian in the crosswalk. Victim in critical condition. Roosevelt Ave closed northbound. Police on scene.
reports.locationLabel: Roosevelt Ave & 74th St, Jackson Heights, Queens, NY

reports.title: Construction Crane Alarm at Hudson Yards
reports.description: Tower crane alarm triggered due to high wind speeds exceeding safe operating threshold. Work suspended. Public asked to clear the area below.
reports.locationLabel: Hudson Yards, West 34th St, Manhattan, NY

reports.title: Multi-Vehicle Accident Blocking Grand Concourse
reports.description: Three-vehicle accident blocking southbound lanes of Grand Concourse. Vehicles unable to pass. Emergency services diverting traffic via Jerome Ave.
reports.locationLabel: Grand Concourse & 167th St, The Bronx, NY

reports.title: Chemical Leak at Staten Island Industrial Site
reports.description: Visible leak at storage tank in industrial zone near West Shore Expressway. Workers evacuated. Coast Guard and DEP notified due to proximity to waterway.
reports.locationLabel: West Shore Expressway, Staten Island, NY

followUpRequests.feedback: Please add approximate road segment or cross streets so crews can locate the hazard.
Crews are aware — additional signage requested.
DEP crew dispatched. Please monitor and update if water level rises.
MTA notified. Estimated repair window 48 hours.

mailchimpEvents.subject: [SafeZone] High Severity Alert: Fallen Tree Blocking Sidewalk
mailchimpEvents.html:
Fallen Tree Blocking Sidewalk

Category: Environmental Hazard

Severity: high

Location: Cadman Plaza West, Brooklyn Heights

A large tree has fallen and is blocking the sidewalk near the park entrance.

mailchimpEvents.subject: [SafeZone] Follow-up Requested: Construction Zone Narrowing Lane
mailchimpEvents.html:
Hi Marcus Hale,

The SafeZone admin team has requested updates on your report Construction Zone Narrowing Lane.

Admin Feedback: Crews are aware — additional signage requested.
